title:
COVID related deaths by cohort
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## COVID related deaths by cohort
The data that used to be available on the te whatu ora website in tables showing the deaths & hospitslisations by age in three cohorts. Unvaccinated, Vaccinated & Boosted.
Undermining confidence in the health service and government, as this was readily available data that has been removed at a point of extreme concern where the boosted cohort. Cintrary to the expected per capita numbers, that would indicate efficacy, instead the cases, hospitalizations & deaths in the boosted cohort, pointed to an increased susceptibility to infection, hospitalisation & a 400% greater likelihood of death. Not only has the information been removed as the COVID inquiry moves forward. The data hasn't just been removed, it has been eradicated from the internet, cannot be found on the wayback machine. This makes it seem that government has hidden very concerning data that should be available to provide people with an informed decision. Moreso when those in the boosted cohort are the ones that appear the most affected.
Demonstrate that the death rate of those in the boosted cohort is much lower than the 400% greater per capita than was expected for the new house.

#### Likely Source Agency
Te Whatu Ora Health New Zealand
